name: Download Payload via Console Using Edge
notes:
This rule detects downloading of payloads using the Edge console.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: mdecrevoisier
SIGMA Title: Edge abuse for payload download via console
SIGMA Description: Detects scenarios where an attacker attemptes to download a payload directly via console.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%cmd.exe' OR LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%powershell.exe' OR LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%pwsh.exe' OR LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%powershell_ise.exe' ) AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%http://%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%https://%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ftp://%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%www.%' ) AND ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%msedge.exe' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Download Payload via Console Using Edge on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%cmd.exe' 	OR LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%powershell.exe' 	OR LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%pwsh.exe' 	OR LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%powershell_ise.exe' ) AND  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%http://%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%https://%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ftp://%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%www.%' ) AND  ( 	LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%msedge.exe' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Download Payload via Console Using Edge
Event description: Detects downloading of payloads using the Edge console.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
